reasoning: TripGenie is a travel planner that needs to feel inspiring, natural, and grounded, evoking real-world destinations rather than a clinical tech tool. Earthy, organic colors paired with high-end typography create a premium, calm, and trustworthy atmosphere for complex trip planning. Avoiding generic SaaS purple/blue in favor of terracotta and sage.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-[#1A2F24]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#1A2F24]

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode B for Dashboard, Mode A for Hero). Base grid 12-cols for flexible sizing.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards, gap-6 or gap-8 between widgets.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for primary cards, rounded-full for chips/buttons. No sharp edges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for static cards, hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] for interactive ones.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary CTA: bg-[#E27D60] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6. Hover: scale slightly, darker bg.
components.cards: Solid background #FFFFFF with delicate 1px border (#E5E4E2). padding: p-6. Subtle shadow. For Hero/Map overlays, use Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-white/40).
components.inputs: Shadcn Form/Input. bg-[#F9F8F6] border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#85B09A].
components.chips: Travel style chips: rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium border border-[#E5E4E2] bg-white hover:border-[#85B09A] hover:bg-[#F0F5F2] text-[#5C6B62] transition-colors.
components.timeline: Day-wise itinerary: Left border in #85B09A. Items have relative positioning, small circular node on the border. Card structure on the right.
components.loading_screen: Multi-agent progress. Staggered fade-ins. Agent status items: text-[#5C6B62] shifting to #1A2F24 when complete. Small pulsing indicator in #E27D60.

motion.hover_states: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg for cards, group-hover:opacity-80 for images.
motion.loading: framer-motion staggered entrance. Custom SVG pulsing for agent status.

hero_backgrounds.description: Green grass field near lake under white sky
Stunning aerial view of a turquoise river winding through a deep, rugged valley

restaurant_images.description: Appetizing dishes served on white plates
Chef pouring sauce over plated steak

testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical text outputs (budget total, hotel name) MUST have data-testid attributes in kebab-case format reflecting their role (e.g., data-testid='plan-trip-submit-button', data-testid='budget-total-text').
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion recharts date-fns.
Set up Tailwind config with provided colors, box shadows, and fonts. Add CSS imports for Cabinet Grotesk (e.g. from Fontshare API) and Manrope (Google Fonts) in index.css.
Implement the Trip Input Form using Shadcn primitives heavily styled to remove the default SaaS look. Use Calendar, Popover for multi-select, and ToggleGroup (or customized chips) for travel style.

Build the Loading State: A full-page overlay with an organic layout (not generic spinner). List the AI agents (Research, Weather, etc.) and use staggered animations to show them 'waking up' and completing tasks.

Design the Dashboard Overview using Bento Grid Layout: Top-left for Trip Summary, Top-right for Budget Summary (Recharts radial or donut), Middle for Weather Cards (horizontal scroll), and Bottom for Saved Trips.
Design the Itinerary Timeline: Use a vertical border path on the left. Each timeline item is a card. Mix transport icons, hotel images, and text seamlessly within these cards.
Ensure generous padding (p-6, p-8) across widgets to let the content breathe. Emphasize progressive disclosure.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Do NOT use purple or teal gradients. Strictly adhere to the Earthy (Terracotta/Sage/Sand) color palette.
